title: B.5 — All-routes-blocked cascade prevention (defensive layer)
verdict: raw 91 C3 honest — sandbox-bound investigation only; no new patch landed

mission_recap.scenario: hetzner blacklisted + ubu1/ubu2 slot-saturated + docker no-node simultaneous failure
mission_recap.goal: dispatcher emits raw 66 ai-native error trailer with reason=all-routes-blocked + remediation block; never silent rc=64
mission_recap.dependency_layer: B.1 (OAuth refresh) + B.2 (slot pool) + B.3 (docker image probe) prevent the cascade upstream; B.5 is the defensive last-mile guarantee

step_1_dispatcher_location.finding: dispatcher lives in sister nexus repo, not canon
step_1_dispatcher_location.cross_repo_contract: canon invokes hexa_remote via PATH; check_remote_dispatch.sh enforces ≥3 'core/canon' refs in hexa_remote (cwd-mapping recurrence guard, 2026-04-24)

step_2_error_path_analysis.finding: raw 66 trailer ALREADY implemented as Issue 5 (2026-04-27, predates this kick by 1 day)
fields_emitted_to_stderr: fix: 4-step ordered remediation (clear neg_cache → probe slots → ssh connectivity → full bypass)
ref: raw#ai-native-error-message + nexus/.guide § Cross-host parity matrix
step_2_error_path_analysis.preceded_by_machine_emit: NEXUS_REMOTE_ERROR JSON line ({hosts_tried, reason, exit_code:64}) — caller (shared/scripts/bin/hexa) parses to disambiguate exit 64 vs 74

step_3_silent_rc64_audit.finding: no silent rc=64 path remaining on the all-routes-blocked branch
step_3_silent_rc64_audit.evidence: every exit 64 is preceded by either NEXUS_REMOTE_ERROR JSON (line 1060, 799, 637) OR _emit_all_routes_blocked_trailer (lines 801, 1062)
step_3_silent_rc64_audit.raw_71_retraction_against_silence: the historical 'all-claude-slots-exhausted' cryptic emit is replaced by the structured trailer per Issue 5 changelog comment line 703-704

step_4_raw_77_audit_ledger.finding: raw 77 append-only audit ledger is NOT written on cascade events from hexa_remote itself
step_4_raw_77_audit_ledger.honest_gap: trailer is ephemeral (stderr only). No persistent JSONL append on the all-routes-blocked path.
step_4_raw_77_audit_ledger.patch_proposal_not_applied: append a single JSONL line to a new ~/.hx/state/all_routes_blocked.jsonl on each emit — schema {ts, reason, hosts_tried[], slot_pool, docker_neg_cache, fix_ref}
step_4_raw_77_audit_ledger.blocker: patch lives in nexus repo (out of canon working tree). Cross-repo write requires user-driven PR or explicit cross-repo delegation, not in scope of this sandbox kick

patch_status.actual: ALREADY APPLIED upstream (2026-04-27, Issue 5). No additional patch needed for trailer itself.
patch_status.remaining_gap: raw 77 audit-ledger append on cascade. Defer to nexus-side PR.
patch_status.raw_71_falsifier_check: if trailer is missing on a future cascade → F-B5-2 fires → reopen Issue 5

simulation_test.intended: mock OAuth expired + slots full + docker stopped → invoke dispatcher → verify trailer + ledger
blockers: sandbox cannot mutate ~/.hx/state/oauth_blacklisted_hosts.jsonl reliably (writes outside repo cwd are policy-restricted under this skill invocation)
stopping docker daemon impacts user environment beyond test scope
saturating 12 claude slots requires real OAuth flow, not safely mockable in-sandbox
simulation_test.alternative_evidence_collected: static read of dispatcher code paths confirms both emit sites unconditionally call _emit_all_routes_blocked_trailer before exit 64
simulation_test.deferred_runtime_test: user-driven dry-run via HEXA_REMOTE_FORCE_BLOCK=1 env (would need to be added in nexus PR alongside ledger append)

falsifiers.condition: any cascade event in next 24h exits with rc=64 WITHOUT 'err hexa_remote/all-routes-blocked' line on stderr
falsifiers.auto_check: partial (grep stderr capture of dispatcher invocations)

falsifiers.condition: trailer emitted but missing ≥1 of the 6 required fields (external_blacklist, docker_neg_cache, slot_pool, fix, ref, reason=)
trailer emitted on a benign 1-route-only outage (e.g. ubu1 alone down, hetzner+ubu2 healthy) — false positive
falsifiers.auto_check: partial (cross-reference probe outcomes — only fire trailer when |healthy_hosts| == 0)
falsifiers.current_safeguard: trailer only emitted from preflight all_unreachable verdict (line 792) and post-loop empty HOST (line 1048) — both require zero healthy candidates

dependencies.B.1_oauth_refresh: if landed → reduces probability of reaching B.5 trailer (cascade upstream-prevented)
dependencies.B.2_slot_pool: if landed → slot_pool field becomes meaningful (otherwise <unprobed> fallback at line 757-761)
dependencies.B.3_docker_probe: if landed → docker_neg_cache field becomes actionable
dependencies.B.5_standalone: valid as defensive layer even if B.1-B.3 not yet landed

deliverables.patch: no canon-side patch needed — dispatcher already emits raw 66 trailer (2026-04-27)
deliverables.patch_deferred_to_nexus: raw 77 audit-ledger append on cascade (cross-repo, requires user delegation)
deliverables.test: static analysis only; runtime simulation deferred (raw 91 C3 honest)

raw_91_c3_honest.claim: B.5 mission goal (raw 66 trailer on all-routes-blocked) was discovered to be ALREADY IMPLEMENTED upstream
what_was_NOT_done: no raw 77 audit ledger patch (cross-repo, out of working tree)
no end-to-end stderr capture against a real all-routes-blocked invocation
what_was_done: verified both emit sites (801, 1062) unconditionally precede exit 64
identified remaining gap: raw 77 ledger append (deferred to nexus PR)
raw_91_c3_honest.delegation_note: user memory directs Agent-tool delegation; Agent dispatcher unavailable in this skill invocation, so investigation performed in-line with strict read-only scope (no writes to nexus repo, no destructive sandbox mutation)
